onboarding.welcome: 👋 Welcome to MamaBot, {{name}}! I'll help you track your pregnancy.
onboarding.already_registered: 👋 You're already registered! Use the menu to navigate.
onboarding.ask_lmp: 📅 Enter the first day of your last menstrual period in DD.MM.YYYY format:
onboarding.invalid_date: ❌ Invalid date format. Please enter the date in DD.MM.YYYY format.
onboarding.date_in_future: ❌ Date cannot be in the future. Please enter a valid date.
onboarding.date_too_old: ⚠️ This date is more than 42 weeks ago. A typical pregnancy lasts about 40 weeks. Please check the date and try again.
onboarding.week_calculated: 🤰 You are {{week}} weeks pregnant! Estimated due date: {{edc}}.
onboarding.edd_confirmed: ✅ EDD {{edd}} saved! You've successfully completed setup.
onboarding.edd_prompt: 📅 Enter the estimated due date in DD.MM.YYYY format:
onboarding.edd_invalid_format: ❌ Invalid date format. Please enter the date in DD.MM.YYYY format.
onboarding.edd_before_lmp: ❌ Due date cannot be before the last menstrual period ({{lmp}}). Please enter a valid date.
onboarding.edd_too_late: ❌ Due date is too far from the last menstrual period (maximum 300 days). Please enter a valid date.
onboarding.edd_saved: ✅ EDD {{edd}} saved! You've successfully completed setup.

settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.reset_confirm: ⚠️ Are you sure? All data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

error.unknown_callback: ❌ Unknown command. Please use the menu.
error.generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again later.
